nasb.text: looking for and hastening the coming of the day of God, because of which the heavens will be destroyed by burning, and the elements will melt with intense heat!

esv.text: waiting for and hastening the coming of the day of God, because of which the heavens will be set on fire and dissolved, and the heavenly bodies will melt as they burn!

cnv.text: 等候並催促　神的日子降臨呢？因為在那日，天要被火焚燒就融化了，所有元素都因烈火而融解！

csbs.text: 等候并催促神的日子来临。因为在那日，诸天将被焚烧而废除，天体要被火焚烧而熔化。
